name: InZer0
overview: InZer0 is a science fiction short movie series made in Detroit in the early 2000s by a team of passionate artists from all disciplines. The intention of the project was to provide a sandbox where all involved would learn exactly what goes into making a movie. Each episode was made on a budget of less than $200.  InZer0 was made before high definition.  Since then, many of InZer0's cast and crew have gone on to successful careers in the movie industry.  Source: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCY34R16L-Zw1HhoOHDPnZqA
